programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en happens to witness Enzhu and Minghua together. Later, Enzhu provokes Zhi-en and when Zhengmin arrives, pretends Zhi-en scolded her, feigning grievance and instantly acting innocent.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 58
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) When Alley was shot and killed, Yajun becomes convinced that her death is the result of Zhengmin's actions and therefore cannot forgive him.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 2
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 13
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan’s father learns from Yunzhen that Shunyong cheated on Zaiyuan. They both decide to keep Zaiyuan in the dark.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 57
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 2
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 32

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 103

programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 54
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 13
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Ngga Usah Ngadi Ngadi Nanti Kamu Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 17
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Yang Salah
programme.desc: Kirana (Jennifer Eve) is heartbroken because her boyfriend suddenly cheated on her with her stepsister, Oliv. Meanwhile, Kirana, who sells chicken eggs, has to deal with Julian (Andrew Andika), who annoys her. However, it turns out that Julian is also the one who saves Kirana when she's in trouble.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 55
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 13
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 2
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 14
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Aaa Kasian Aaa Kesengsem Sama Idolaaa
programme.desc: Vivian (Ersya Aurelia) accidentally collides with Erdin Werdrayana. Erdin turns out to be an idol adored by many women and pursued by his fans because of his good looks.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Daniel asks Siska (Ersya Aurelia) to learn how to cook because his family owns a restaurant, and his mother stipulates that his wife must be a good cook. Siska eventually enlists the help of Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex, who is a chef and owns a culinary business.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 14
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 18
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Horang Kaya Dengan Kearifan Cinta Lokalnya
programme.desc: Maya's (Jennifer Eve) family suddenly receives a windfall, becoming wealthy and wealthy. Maya's father, wanting a comfortable new home for his family, decides to buy a luxury home. Meanwhile, Aryan (Fauzan Nasrul), a young man, has just returned to Indonesia from abroad. Upon arriving home, he is shocked to discover that his house has become Maya's family's. A dispute ensues between Aryan and Maya's family.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a country bumpkin. Dara's arrival in Jakarta was originally to find her birth mother, but instead, she met Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza was ordered by his grandfather to marry Dara, even though he has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 1
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: MODE CARI JODOH MODE ON
programme.desc: Shanice Margaretha is horrified when her parents try to arrange her marriage with Fauzan Nasrul. Determined to escape this 'old fashioned' setup, she tries to run away but gets into an accident that leaves her with amnesia. Ironically, the man who rescues and cares for her is none other than Fauzan, the fiancé she was trying to avoid.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 203
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Seumuran Memang Berkelas Tapi Brondong Lebih Menggoda
programme.desc: Nathan (Alzi Markers) approaches Jamilah (Anjani Dina) with a hidden agenda fueled by his sister, Avril. His goal is to steal Jamilah’s secret family recipe. However, as he gets closer to her, Nathan genuinely falls in love. The romance is shattered when Jamilah discovers that their entire relationship was built on a lie to steal her business secrets.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 5
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 151
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MODE CARI JODOH MODE ON

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 203
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Jangan Love Ugal Ugalan Ya Dek
programme.desc: After failing to get married three times for bizarre reasons, Jelita (Raisya Bawazier) suspects she is being haunted by her past. She remembers cruelly rejecting a chubby boy back in school and hires a friend to find him, convinced he is the source of her bad luck. Little does she know, the boy has transformed into Dani (Masaji Wijayanto), a handsome and athletic man.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 5
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Bulan Terbelah di Hati Mas Silver
programme.desc: Fikri is a 'Silver Man' (street performer) who falls in love with Bulan, a beautiful municipal police officer (Satpol PP). Despite their frequent romantic encounters, Bulan remains professional. When duty calls, she doesn't hesitate to arrest Fikri, leading to a complicated 'cat-and-mouse' romance between the law and the street.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 152

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 204
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama (El Ryan Carlen) is furious after a collision with Ira (Rayna Snova) leaves his banana stock crushed in the street. Ira is equally annoyed because her own cart is ruined, but she eventually agrees to compensate Rama on one condition: she gets to keep whatever is left of the stock to resell it herself.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 6
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 152
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: OB CANTIK PENCABUT RASA GALAU
programme.desc: Raya's love story is often taken advantage of by her boyfriend for being too much of a pussycat.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 204
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama (El Ryan Carlen) is furious after a collision with Ira (Rayna Snova) leaves his banana stock crushed in the street. Ira is equally annoyed because her own cart is ruined, but she eventually agrees to compensate Rama on one condition: she gets to keep whatever is left of the stock to resell it herself.

programme.title: MODE CARI JODOH MODE ON
programme.desc: Shanice Margaretha is horrified when her parents try to arrange her marriage with Fauzan Nasrul. Determined to escape this 'old fashioned' setup, she tries to run away but gets into an accident that leaves her with amnesia. Ironically, the man who rescues and cares for her is none other than Fauzan, the fiancé she was trying to avoid.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 204
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Seumuran Memang Berkelas Tapi Brondong Lebih Menggoda
programme.desc: Nathan (Alzi Markers) approaches Jamilah (Anjani Dina) with a hidden agenda fueled by his sister, Avril. His goal is to steal Jamilah’s secret family recipe. However, as he gets closer to her, Nathan genuinely falls in love. The romance is shattered when Jamilah discovers that their entire relationship was built on a lie to steal her business secrets.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 6
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 153
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 205
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Gak Naksir Cewek Cleaning Glowing
programme.desc: Salsa’s (Soraya Rasyid) dream trip to Korea is canceled after her family suddenly goes bankrupt. To support herself, she takes a job as a cleaning service worker. At her workplace, she meets Al (Masaji Wijayanto) and El (Jeremiah Rakesh), two bickering brothers who both fall for her and start a fierce competition for her heart.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 7
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 153
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 34
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 3
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 12
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 6
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 1
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 4
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 20
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 2
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 19
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sape Terer - EP 10
programme.desc: Sape Terer merupakan 'game show' yang mempertemukan artis otai dan artis baharu bersaing merebut gelaran juara setiap episod.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 4
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 37
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Mind Your Loghat - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang memartabatkan dialek, budaya dan makanan asli. Dua selebriti akan menyediakan hidangan dari kampung halaman dan mesti bercakap dengan dialek negeri mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 35
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 1
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Awaklah Imam Saya
programme.desc: Dua gadis jelita di sebuah kampung mencari calon suami yang mampu membimbing dan menjadi imam mereka selepas berkahwin. Pelbagai usaha dilakukan jejaka-jejaka yang ingin memenangi hati mereka.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends Live - EP 2
programme.desc: Kumpulan pelawak popular, Bocey kembali beraksi dengan sketsa komedi yang menarik. Nantikan siapakah tetamu istimewa yang akan beraksi bersama mereka.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 25
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 2
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Layan Je Maharaja Lawak - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Super Wira - EP 7
programme.desc: Aman tiada kuasa istimewa tidak seperti ayahnya, ketua kumpulan Super Wira. Ibunya telah diculik oleh penjahat super yang misteri dan Aman cuba untuk menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 1
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2023 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Klik Riders - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan hiburan untuk seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Boss Kira - EP 10
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka

programme.title: Opocot Next Level - EP 8
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular menyelesaikan tugasan sambil diganggu dengan cabaran yang melucukan. Kumpulan manakah yang bakal berjaya?

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 6
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Masak Wars - EP 8
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, 5 peserta mewakili negeri masing-masing akan bertanding untuk membuktikan masakan negeri mereka yang terbaik. Dihoskan oleh Keanu Azman.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 2

programme.desc: Diterajui oleh Sherry Alhadad, Roy Azman & Haiqal Hairuddin dibantu selebriti jemputan demi merebut hadiah tunai dua kali ganda bernilai RM1 juta dengan beberapa syarat.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Kuasa 2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Betul Ke Bohong kembali lagi dengan KUASA 2 dimana lebih kuasa dan lebih kecoh! Memperkenalkan Sherry Al Haddad sebagai host terbaharu.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 7
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Mind Your Loghat - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan masakan yang memartabatkan dialek, budaya dan makanan asli. Dua selebriti akan menyediakan hidangan dari kampung halaman dan mesti bercakap dengan dialek negeri mereka.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 5
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 3
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 11
programme.desc: Oya berjaya mendapatkan sebuah rumah sewa dan mendiaminya bersama rakan-rakan terdekat. Mika tidak pasti jika dia mahu menyambung semula pengajiannya. Umai ada rancangan lain untuk dirinya.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Benci - EP 25
programme.desc: Semua wanita yang didekati Migo hanya untuk memenuhi keperluan pertaruhannya bersamai dengan rakan-rakan dan juga membuktikan dirinya sebagai playboy sejati.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: My Buskers - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mempersembahkan selebriti-selebriti tempatan menyanyi bersama-sama dengan buskers-buskers tempatan menyanyikan lagu-lagu popular.

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 1
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Love Elsa - EP 13
programme.desc: Setiap kali Ammara sentuh dengan kulit manusia, dia akan melihat masa lalu seseorang. Ketidaksempurnaannya jadi kelebihan bila dia menolong Ridza dalam menyelesaikan kes pembunuhan keluarga Ridza.

programme.title: Kecundang Sebelum Menjanda
programme.desc: Hari terbahagia dalam hidup Nora berubah menjadi suram bila tunangnya menarik diri pada hari pernikahan mereka. Tambah buruk lagi, hari selepas tragedi itu asyik berulang atas sebab-sebab misteri.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 2
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Sedapur Bersama - EP 15
programme.desc: Program masakan yang menambat hati penonton dengan berkongsikan resepi hidangan lazat dan nilai - nilai dalam perhubungan.

programme.title: Extreme Roadtrip - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan travelog yang akan mengikuti pengembaraan 3 sekawan menerokai tempat-tempat menarik di semenanjung Malaysia demi merealisasikan bucketlist masing-masing.

programme.title: Jejak Jepun - EP 9
programme.desc: Ikuti kembara Zizan Razak ke seluruh Jepun, menyelami keunikan budaya serta melawati destinasi-destinasi yang menarik.

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 11
programme.desc: Oya berjaya mendapatkan sebuah rumah sewa dan mendiaminya bersama rakan-rakan terdekat. Mika tidak pasti jika dia mahu menyambung semula pengajiannya. Umai ada rancangan lain untuk dirinya.

programme.title: Histeria - The Series - EP 1
programme.desc: Alia pindah ke sekolah Sri Fatimah & cuba sesuaikan diri. Dia berkenalan dengan Putri dan Vanidah dan diberitahu bilik Alia dulu milik seorang pelajar bunuh diri, Farah.

programme.title: Siapa Takut Orang Ketiga - EP 10
programme.desc: Kimi berpindah ke Switzerland dan bertemu William yang membantu Kimi mendapatkan pekerjaan. Samuel, kawan Kimi, merasakan Kimi semakin rapat dengan William.

programme.title: Bintang Minggu Ini SR 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan konsert dari artis artis popular terus ke rumah anda.

programme.title: Eat Clean With Anis - EP 13
programme.desc: Dalam kehidupan yang sentiasa sibuk, kita punya masa yang singkat untuk menyediakan makanan. Tiada yang lebih sempurna jika kita dapat menyediakan hidangan yang pantas, sihat, seimbang serta berkhasiat.

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap The Series - EP 13
programme.desc: Nini dan Haikal iaitu adik beradik tiri menjadi bosan apabila asyik bertukar rumah, justeru mereka merancang untuk menyatukan Hairi dan Lisa iaitu penjaga sementara mereka.

programme.title: Kebun Urban - EP 8
programme.desc: Razif akan menemuramah serta mencungkil rahsia petani-petani kecilan di Malaysia yang menanam sayuran dihalaman rumah mereka. Razif dan Sherson Lian akan memasak resipi ringkas menggunakan tanaman mereka.

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Cooking - EP 1
programme.desc: Sherry Al Hadad yang tidak tahu masak, ingin belajar memasak dari ibu angkatnya, Datin Marlia Musa untuk di jamukan pada rakan-rakan selebriti popular.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Hanna, seorang wanita aktif mula berasa bosan dengan kehidupan hariannya mendapat idea untuk memulakan perniagaan menjual cupcake.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 6
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 4

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: My Buskers - EP 4

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 2
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Love Elsa - EP 14

programme.title: The Bobot

programme.title: Sedapur Bersama - EP 16

programme.desc: Partners in crime Jai and Veeru set their next target on a rich businessman, Rai Bahadur. Things turn hilarious when both of them fall for his daughters. Release Year: 2001 Director: David Dhawan

programme.desc: Gurpreet and Rajbir want to marry each other but Rajbir's compulsion to pay alimony to his ex-wife Neha seems a hurdle. To get rid of this constraint, they must convince Neha to marry someone.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Blood VS. Duty

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.desc: Governor Sylvestre has been kidnapped by members of the FLA. A disappearance that has everyone worried. Caro Majeau presents the new ''bechrel'' to Hamelin and his team. Karine is furious, whilst the population is still suffering regular power cuts.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 6
programme.desc: Jessika Walsh reads the FLA manifesto live on national television. The whole population is aghast to learn of the kidnapping of Governor Sylvestre. Hamelin stands firm: he triggers the law that puts the country on a war footing!

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 7
programme.desc: Rivard has a meeting in his office with the members of the FLA. On the internet, a video showing Karine slapping Hamelin goes viral, just as the French president is visiting Quebec. Tension mounts between Hamelin and the latter...

programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.desc: We visit two couples whose love and hard work have helped give a second life to an old school in Sherbrooke and we discover an abandoned church in Harrington. And we meet a stained-glass artist, real architecture with light.

programme.title: Les Regles Du Jeu
programme.desc: Lolita does not like to smile. Kevin does not know how to sell himself. Hamid does not like bosses. At 20, without any diploma, they are looking for work. For six months, the coaches from a placement agency will teach them the behaviour and language one must have today to land a job.

programme.title: Alterrenative Voyages - EP 3
programme.desc: We head to the port of Fribourg before meeting a young couple of cheesemakers who produce Alpine gruyere and then visiting Estavayer-le-Lac and its biodiversity reserve, source of green energy.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 26
programme.desc: While investigating Lily's troubled past after she is found poisoned, Marleau quickly directs her suspicions toward Frederic Lefranc. The actor and director had sent several love letters to the young woman. From the theatre stage to the crime scene, the line becomes blurred.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 7
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 9
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes - EP 4
programme.desc: Train of legend, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express, runs from Venice to Paris. After more than a century of service, the inlaid wood interiors have been preserved thanks to the exceptional skills of the craftsmen of Auvergne. A journey through the land of volcanoes, where tradition and expertise are still handed down.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Green - EP 1
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagu Raja
programme.desc: Azhagu Raja, who owns a cable channel, always mocks Priya, who fails at everything. Eventually, love blossoms between them, but their families' bitter past becomes an obstacle to their marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Kaathalar Dhinam
programme.desc: Raja and Roja meet in an Internet chat room and fall in love, but a series of mishaps prevent them from expressing their love for the other. Later, Raja learns the truth of her identity and is upset.

programme.title: Movie - Kulir 100
programme.desc: Surya's mother enrols him to an elite school in a bid to separate him from his rowdy past. Being a misfit, he only has Babloo and the principal's daughter by his side. Soon, Babloo is found dead.

programme.title: Movie - Kuppi
programme.desc: After the assassination of a prominent leader, Shivrasan takes shelter in a house owned by Ranganath. When the police zero in on the hideout after thorough investigation, they get attacked.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ragasiya Police
programme.desc: Surya, a police officer, is removed from a criminal case when he is on the verge of tracing the culprit. However, when it is handed to his friend, he gets killed and Surya sets out to catch the killer.

programme.title: Movie - Pournami Naagam
programme.desc: To obtain the 'nagmani', a group of girls attack a cobra pair. Unfortunately, the male cobra dies while his partner escapes. Infuriated, she decides to take revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Thadam
programme.desc: During the investigation of a man's murder, the police find their prime suspect. However, the case gets complicated when the police also learn that their suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Movie - Deiva Vaakku
programme.desc: Hamsaveni's divine power earns her respect among the villagers, whereas her brother Vallatharai tries to exploit her power for his personal gain. He goes to the extent of sabotaging her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagiya Tamil Magan
programme.desc: Guru is an MBA student who is diagnosed with ESP. Since his vision significantly improves, he runs away to Mumbai, but things take an unexpected turn when he sees his lookalike stab his girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie - Vellai Yaanai
programme.desc: Vellai is a farmer from an economically self-sufficient village. But when he and the villagers take a bank's crop loan, they get caught in debt due to drought and low prices for crops. A few desperate farmers migrate to the city in search of a job. Can they pay off their debt?

programme.title: Movie - Maalai Pozhuthin Mayakathilaey
programme.desc: A real-time playout of events at a coffee shop over nearly two hours on a rainy evening. A married couple fight over the lack of romance in their lives, while it blossoms between two strangers just a table away.

programme.title: Movie - Mahan Kanakku
programme.desc: Jeeva's brother-in-law is harassed by bank officials despite having paid off all loans. When he finally commits suicide, Jeeva takes advantage of the loopholes in banking to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Uyarntha Ullam
programme.desc: Anand, a wealthy man, spends his time drinking, gambling and entertaining his friends. When he meets Geetha, a young woman, he is smitten by her and decides to mend his ways.

programme.title: Movie - Dhinandhorum
programme.desc: Dhinamdhorum is a Tamil film directed by Nagaraj. The film features Murali and Suvalakshmi in the lead roles, while Manivannan and Renuka play other supporting roles. The film, which has music by Oviyan, was released in February 1998.

programme.title: Movie - Amaidhi Padai
programme.desc: A homeless pauper, Amavasai works his way up to become a corrupt politician. However, his illegitimate son, a policeman, decides to destroy Amavasai for cheating his mother.

programme.title: Movie - Veettoda Maapillai
programme.desc: A hardworking man who has three daughters owns and manages a restaurant. Impressed by the sincerity of his newly-appointed hotel manager, he decides to get his youngest daughter married to him, but the other two sons-in-law do not like him.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Goundar
programme.desc: The village head is a man who sticks to honesty while making judgements. However, when he falls prey to a conspiracy, he bravely fights to ensure that justice prevails in his village.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Day 1 Session 1 Tie 2: France vs Thailand (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Fulham vs Newcastle United (MW38) - EP 374
programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.title: Burnley vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW38) - EP 372
programme.desc: Burnley have lost just one of their last 10 Premier League games against Wolves (W5 D4), and are looking for their second double against them in the competition, after 2020-21.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Bournemouth (MW38) - EP 377
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are winless in all seven of their Premier League games against Bournemouth (D3 L4), both the most they’ve faced a side without ever winning, and the most the Cherries have faced a side without losing in the competition.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Leeds United (MW38) - EP 380
programme.desc: If West Ham fail to win they will be relegated from the Premier League for the third time, after 2002-03 and 2010-11. It will also mean 2026-27 will be the first top-flight season not to feature any teams beginning with ‘W’ since 1910-11.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester United (MW38) - EP 371
programme.desc: Brighton have the highest win rate against Manchester United of any side in Premier League history both overall (47% - 8/17) and at home (63% - 5/8).

programme.title: Liverpool vs Brentford (MW38) - EP 375
programme.desc: Liverpool lost 3-2 in the reverse fixture against Brentford, but have never lost consecutive league games against the Bees before.

programme.title: Fulham vs Newcastle United (MW38) - EP 374
programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.title: Sunderland vs Chelsea (MW38) - EP 378
programme.desc: Of all teams to have played in more than five Premier League campaigns, Sunderland have the lowest win rate in their final game of the season, winning just one of their 16 matches (6% - D3 L12).

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Everton (MW38) - EP 379
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last 10 home league games (D4 L6), their second-longest run in their league history after a 14-game streak between October 1993 and April 1994.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Aston Villa (MW38) - EP 376
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 19 of their last 20 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, winning each of the last 15 since a 2-0 loss in April 2007.

programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Dricus Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features main event Dricus 'Stillknocks' Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar in the Middleweight Championsihp from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 Joel Julio vs.James Kirkland
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 12: Kerala, India - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kalarippayattu and the Martial Art of Sword, Shield, Sticks, Open Hand and Kicks with Master Sureshan Nambiar.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 features Hakuho, Aoiyama, Asanoyama and Kakuryu from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Dricus Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features main event Dricus 'Stillknocks' Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar in the Middleweight Championsihp from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 Joel Julio vs.James Kirkland
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 12: Kerala, India - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kalarippayattu and the Martial Art of Sword, Shield, Sticks, Open Hand and Kicks with Master Sureshan Nambiar.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 features Hakuho, Aoiyama, Asanoyama and Kakuryu from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston

Episode 2 of 4.

programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features main event Dricus 'Stillknocks' Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar in the Middleweight Championsihp from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Shane Mosley vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights 'Sugar' Shane Mosley (43-4, 37 KOs) and Luis Collazo (27-2, 13 KOs) fighting over the interim WBC title. This fight took place at the Mandalay Bay Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA, on February 10, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tokyo Grand Slam where the home nation is looking to dominate as they fielded 7 of Japan's 8 world champions. Plus we catch up with Japan's brother and sister superstars, the Abe's.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Andre Berto defending the WBC welterweight title against former WBA champion Luis Collazo. Each fighter had their own share of getting stunned throughout the bout, and the judges' decision at the end will have some controversy. Also on the card, kickboxing takes center stage as super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita takes on Gokhan Saki.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 1 features Kotoshoho, Terunofuji, Hokutofuji and Tochinoshin.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 111
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'robot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Messy goes to Okido and learns how to 'jog' his memory,

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Preston is in costume as everyone's favourite character, Dewey Dragon, but he isn't ready for how demanding Dewey's fans are. Mojo and Bo need to help him escape the crowd.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 47
programme.desc: The Go Jetters learn about 'symbiosis' - when two different animals or plants help each other.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: When Bingo drops Mum's breakfast-in-bed on the floor, she's convinced she's ruined her big day. But Bluey helps make amends by putting on a play of how Mum and Dad first met.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Namibian desert in Southern Africa and meets a giraffe.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'dragon' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of dragons!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 48
programme.desc: The Westman Islands are home to one of the largest colonies of puffins in the world! Once a year puffins return to the land to lay a single egg.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with help from his true love.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Mr Hammond has asked Andy to give a talk about elephant shrews. Andy heads to the African Savannah to find the tiny creature.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 44
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Chloe and Ice Bear search the perfect Christmas tree.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: BMO ropes his friends into a live action cowboy adventure!

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven befriends a magical mirror that can mysteriously communicate with him.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Quest For The Priestess' Cloak - EP 1
programme.desc: Jaime finds her way back to the Philippine capital of Metro Manila, where she braves traffic jams, marches through its wartime past, scores an ancient amulet of protection & takes a leap at circus life.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Quest For The Priestess' Cloak - EP 2
programme.desc: Jaime makes her way to the world-famous party paradise of Boracay, where she grows a set of fins, finds herself in a slippery situation, conquers a grand waterfall and reaches her boiling point.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 609
programme.desc: Rick takes a trip down the rabbit hole after a seller hops in with a first edition of "Alice's Adventures in Wonderland." Can it make Rick grin like the Cheshire Cat, or drive him mad?

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: In 1983, underdog company Tonka sets out to bring a game-changing toy from Japan to America: the transformable robot. But they're soon confronted by industry giant, Hasbro, who has its own competing line.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 45
programme.desc: An upstart named Oscar Mayer creates one of the most iconic meat brands on the planet. While Jay Hormel invents a meat product sold the world over, which becomes part of a 20-billion-dollar food empire.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: From riding tree trunks down a slope to hosting a barrage of monkeys for an all-you-can-eat buffet to a food fight of epic proportions. These are the stories of history's most extraordinary traditions.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: For millennia, there has been speculation about how the world will end. From the detailed account in the Book of Revelation to the prophecies foretold by Nostradamus. Could any of these come true?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26) - EP 391
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey go hog wild for a four-generation carny collection complete with carousel horses, toy tanks, and bumper cars. Down the road in New Hampshire, the guys head to Roger's analogue laboratory.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the unreal truth about everyday products of the past that were way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye. Sensational items like mail-order dynamite and radioactive dishes.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 1
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 2
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 3
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - EP 2
programme.desc: The Landry's target the legendary beasts of Cow Island. Daniel sets an ambitious goal to catch 10 alligators over 10 feet long. Ashley gambles on a new hunting ground.

programme.desc: Uncover the dark secrets of an island off Penang, a mysterious colonial castle and a prehistoric human settlement in Perak.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 6
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 7
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: In Boston, a 25-foot tidal wave of...molasses? A dancing plague that kills 100 people? A surgery with a 300% mortality rate? We search the globe for the strangest and most bizarre deaths on record.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 14
programme.desc: After months of tireless work and focused research, the massive excavation to recover the fabled Chappell Vault begins.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: The underbelly of science has never lurked as prominently as when it was harnessed for state-sanctioned 'research'. In newly published records, discover Stalin's trials to create a hybrid human-ape army.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 2
programme.desc: Marty desperately searches for a bull moose that vanished in thick brush; Mike hustles to pack out the meat from a bull elk before it can be scavenged by brown bears.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S4) - EP 5
programme.desc: A mother of four is accused of killing her 11-week-old baby and is now facing life in prison. The prosecution alleges the infant was violently shaken-but the defence insists this isn't what happened.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15) - EP 7
programme.desc: As a practised midwife, Terri enjoys being part of what makes a community strong and healthy. Being on call 24 hours a day has enabled Terri to hide her personal life in the depths of her hoarded home.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Tara Grinstead's sudden disappearance goes unexplained for 11 years until a surprising statement to law enforcement from Bo Dukes, a former student, names his friend and former classmate as her killer.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 10
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 1
programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.desc: When the Singapore Police need help, they turn to Lim Chin Chin, the Director of Forensic Chemistry and Physics Laboratory.

programme.title: If You're Listening - Black Swans (2026) - EP 3

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 81

programme.title: CNBC Cures: Defying Rare Disease
programme.desc: CNBC’s Becky Quick steps out from behind the anchor desk to share her family’s private battle with her daughter’s rare disease. Through her story and others like it, Quick reveals the challenges facing families trapped between breakthrough science and funding gaps.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S3 - EP 13
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on "NBA Inside Stuff."

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S3 - EP 9
programme.desc: Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck talks about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars. How a US government agency set out to prove suppliers to research labs were importing wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork.

programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.
