Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 41 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world’s hidden secrets.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Hoshi Shinichi's Short Story: The Man Who Came From Earth" Encore
programme.desc: Hoshi Shinichi wrote more than 1000 stories in his life, and they are still read by many people in the current generation. His short stories have the essences of mysterious science fiction, fantasy, and irony against human and society. This program depicts the world of his masterpieces in live-action drama.

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 26
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life - EP 5
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family "reboot" drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon - EP 32
programme.desc: This historical drama sheds new light on the figure of Lee Bang Won, a leader who took the lead in the founding of the nation.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 4
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 6
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2814
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 22
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2218
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong International Chairman Fong Yeung-tin and his mother Mdm Fong Luk Chiu-kwan engage each other in a legal battle as they disagree on the issue of setting up a family trust. Rewind one year, and Fong director Kwong Wai-leung buys some special edition bling form Chung Tak Jewellry, But he discovers it’s a fake, so he vents his anger on Yeung-tin’s eldest son Fong Hok-lai.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 38
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 24
programme.desc: After Kei-tsun’s death, Moon-yuet focuses on dealing with Wai-wan. First, she has to remove wiseguys Wong Yat-ching and Yau-tung, who work for Wai-wan. Moon-yuet and Pak-chung slyly let police discover Kei-tsun’s bloodstains in Yat-ching’s car. And police ask Yat-ching and Yau-tung to assist the investigation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 25
programme.desc: Moon-yuet gathers some clue about Wing-yuen getting killed from some online video. She hopes to prove Hei-sun is innocent in the murder case. Shing Fung points out Wai-wan needs to gain the support of renowned brand Carsoli to ensure her luxury goods empire is a success. And Carsoli happens to be fighting a legal battle over inheritance with their younger sister, so it is a good opportunity.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The Fongs are in turmoil. Hok-lai and Hok-kan are at their wits’ end in the face of a hostile takeover of their company. Yeung-tin is in a coma. Hok-lai’s uncle Tung Yau-wai seems to secretly hope that Yeung-tin will never come round. Yeung-tin’s buddy Lam Ching disguises herself as a nurse and sneaks into the ward.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 40
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2220
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 892
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 23
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 14
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 6
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 9
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 22
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 23

programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 22
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 23
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 23
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 14
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 6
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 9
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 27
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: This is a gritty and realistic Chinatown tale about the life of a Chinese illegal immigrant and his journey in New York. He is looking for a fake marriage with a girl so as to gain the right of abode there. Despite all the hardships and misfortunes, he tries to cope with life and reach for his dreams.

programme.title: Mr Vampire
programme.desc: Taoist priest Kou is assigned to re-bury a rich man, in the hope that the new tomb will bring further prosperity. When the corpse turns into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the village, his disciples are also hurt by the vampire and possessed by a female ghost respectively. How can Kou save his disciples and hunt down the vampire at the same time?

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika's mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn...

programme.title: I Love Lolanto
programme.desc: Lolanto, a playboy, is injured and meets the daughter of a tycoon, Man, in the hospital. Man is mentally retarded and makes friends easily with Lolanto hence Man's father hires him to take care of her. However, as Man goes through treatments and recovers, her feelings for Lolanto also changes...

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation...

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh II
programme.desc: Bodyguard Ah Sun is sent to protect his boss' son, only to meet and fall in love with his mistress, the gorgeous Joey. As love blossoms between the two, the powerful boss finds out and all hell breaks loose!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then...

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Seoul Raiders
programme.desc: A special agent from the Japanese National Security teams up with a skilled thief to find a pair of plates used to make counterfeit USD. However, a US Embassy representative appears and steals the plates, running away to Korea with them.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi will inherit his dying grandfather's fortune with one condition - he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. Chi falls in love with Siu Siu, but Robert intends to stop them by sending Moraine to seduce Chi. When Moraine decides to marry Chi for money, Robert stops her and reveals their plot.

programme.title: Hong Kong Hong Kong
programme.desc: After moving to Hong Kong, illegal immigrant Mang has no choice but to live in cramped quarters with male migrants who abuse her. In order to attain Hong Kong residency and a better life, she agrees to marry a lonely old carpenter. After her marriage, Mang crosses paths again with her ex-lover, and the two develop a passionate affair...

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng's friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events...

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society's conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Look for a Star
programme.desc: Sam is a charismatic tycoon who has been divorced three times. When he meets Milan, a cabaret dancer and croupier, they immediately fall in love. However, their romance faces challenges when he proposes a prenuptial agreement, putting their budding relationship at risk.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Befriending a powerful mobster Tam, Ma is given his nightclub when he saves Tam's life. Ma's fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Bo Yi's husband is having an affair, so Bo Yi divorces him and joins the "Happy Spinsters Club" set up by her friends. However, she soon finds out that she does not enjoy being single and while sorting out her thoughts, her repentant husband begs her forgiveness. She must now decide on what she truly wants.

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover's death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: Mr Vampire III
programme.desc: Taoist conman Ming fails to banish vengeful spirits and escapes with his ghostly companions. As they seek refuge in a village, they encounter an evil witch whose goal is to eliminate the human race. Ming then allies with Taoist priest Master Jiu to battle the witch-but can they prevail against such overwhelming darkness?

programme.title: Cherie
programme.desc: Cherie Chung plays the title character in this sexy romance as a fitness instructor who attracts the attentions of a wealthy businessman and a handsome photographer.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: A bandit became a warlord in northern China by helping Russia fight against Japan. Due to his ignorance and silly behaviour, he is seen as a joke to everyone. The warlord is finally killed by the daughter of a troupe master whom he had killed for no reason, bringing a befitting end to a traitor.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes.

programme.title: Moonlight Serenade
programme.desc: A sweet inn-keeper's daughter is witness to a perverted rape, leading to more danger than most romantic dramas can handle. Can her true love rescue her in time? For this movie, the moonlight serenade is the sound of suspense, leading to more danger than most romantic dramas can handle.

programme.title: The Thunderbolt Fist
programme.desc: A vicious Japanese judo expert wants to prove that Chinese are the "sick people of Asia" and sets out to sabotage and kill the best martial artists in dangerous tournaments. To save his son from this, the head of Ping Pai Boxing Institute sends him to the mountains to learn the powerful Thunderbolt Fist technique from master fighter, Red Butterfly.

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: This sequel to The Empress Dowager continues the tale of Emperor Guangxu and Empress Dowager Cixi. Despite Guangxu's enthronement, his ability to rule effectively is overshadowed by the ever-present power of Cixi. When his attempts to reform the Imperial system are thwarted by the Empress Dowager, Guangxu attempts to curb her power.

programme.title: Five Superfighters
programme.desc: A kung fu master and his three students lost everything after they are floored by a bully. To take revenge, the students find ways to learn from other kung fu masters and come back six months later to have a rematch with the bully on their master's birthday.

programme.title: Apartment for Ladies
programme.desc: A Taiwanese singer comes to Hong Kong in search for her missing younger sister, who had arrived in Hong Kong to be discovered as a nightclub singer. She finds lodging at an apartment for women run by a man-hating landlady, Mrs Chan. However, Mrs Chan cannot confine the young ladies' youthful vitality within the apartment.

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong's enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Till the End of Time
programme.desc: Ming marries singer Ling, defying his wealthy father and severing family ties. When Ling becomes pregnant, Ming's overwork causes him to lose his sight. To support their home, Ling returns to the stage but Ming leaves to avoid becoming a burden. Encouraged by a friend, Ling performs again, and her song moves Ming to reunite with his wife and child.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang's masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: The Yellow Muffler
programme.desc: Japanese director Inoue Umetsugu takes on the glitzy world of nightclub performers in The Yellow Muffler. The film depicts the struggle of two singing sisters, Ching-ping (Irene Chen I-ling) and Pai-hung (Betty Ting Pei) and ends when they are cast in a new movie.

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house's owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Crocodile River
programme.desc: This story has a Romeo and Juliet flavour. Two families who hate each other live across the opposite sides of a river filled with crocodiles and do not bother to have a bridge built. Their respective children meet in university and fall in love, but have to find ways to be together and resolve the hatred between their families.

programme.title: Heads For Sale
programme.desc: Hua is an upright and brave swordswoman who will stand up against villains and do anything for Luo, the man she loves. When Luo is sent to jail by the corrupted police, she sets out to free him and did not hesitate to chop off two bodyguards' heads. In the process, she also stumbles across an old enemy of her father who is back seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Female Prince
programme.desc: Hsiao's stepmother frames her fiance Lung when he refuses to forfeit their engagement and sends him to prison. To save him, Hsiao disguises as Lung to take the Imperial exam and ranks first place. Impressed by Hsiao, the Emperor weds the Princess to 'him'. When Hsiao comes clean on their wedding night, she persuades the Princess to follow a plan...

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: Crazy Nuts Of Kung Fu
programme.desc: A roadside bandit and a traveling gambler team up to make money from gambling. In a successful attempt to steal a huge amount of money from a warlord's home, they encounter revolutionists who seek their help to fund the reform campaign. Will the two help the revolutionists' cause with the stolen money?

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: Melody of Love
programme.desc: Three young doctors pursue three hard-to-get beauties in this romantic film set in the 70s "a-go-go" era. They have no idea where to start and use Rock-paper-scissor method to match themselves with the girls. The tactics and tricks they use are hilarious and they have to reshuffle their plans when nothing leads to success!

programme.title: Swordsman and Enchantress
programme.desc: The story happens in a martial arts world where everyone tries to obtain the "Deer Sword". Lian's wife is wounded in an ambush and his rival Xiao saves her. They escape to Xiao's home and he treats her poisonous wound. This leads Lian to suspect his wife's faithfulness and results in several blood-splattering duels with Xiao.

programme.title: The Snake Prince
programme.desc: The Snake Prince lives on the Snake Mountain of Kwangsi with other snakes and they have lived peacefully with humans for a thousand years. All things change however, when the Snake Prince falls in love with one of the three beauties performing a sensual rain dance in the nearby village one day, and decides to marry her at all costs...

programme.title: Ghosts Galore
programme.desc: Young Taoist priest Lu and his friend are nearly killed by a female ghost during an exorcism. Luckily, Master Lian saves their lives, so they beseech him to teach them his skills. When his friend is killed by ruthless ninjas, Lu decides to learn the ultimate witchcraft and teams up with his master to defeat them.

programme.title: The Venus' Tear Diamond
programme.desc: Legendary rival jewel thieves Fragrant Night and Nocturnal Earl travel to Japan to steal the famous Venus' Tear Diamond. They fall quickly in love at first sight, without knowing the other person is their rival and is after the same prize. Who will get the diamond, and will it mean the end of their new found love?

programme.title: Martial Arts of Shaolin
programme.desc: Zhi Ming, who trains at the Northern Shaolin Temple, teams up with Si Ma Yan, who trains at the Southern Shaolin Temple, to avenge both their fathers' death by assassinating a corrupt magistrate, leading to a series of fierce battles!

programme.title: The Lotus Lamp
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai plays both mother and son in this lavish fable about a goddess who falls in love with a mortal scholar (Cheng Pei-pei in her debut role). Over two years in production, it was released on the first anniversary of Linda's tragic suicide.

programme.title: Return of the One-armed Swordsman
programme.desc: One-armed Swordsman Fang Kang wants to lead a quiet life with his wife, but when she is abducted by the Eight Demon Swordsmen clan, he is forced to take them on in order to save her.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him...

programme.title: The Imperial Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: The story revolves around a maverick, a band of woman warriors and a group of ruthless bandits. The maverick teams up with the woman warriors to battle the bandits seeking to raid the emperor's tomb.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 103
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 8
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 33
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 1
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 457
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 16
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 890
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 22
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2218
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong International Chairman Fong Yeung-tin and his mother Mdm Fong Luk Chiu-kwan engage each other in a legal battle as they disagree on the issue of setting up a family trust. Rewind one year, and Fong director Kwong Wai-leung buys some special edition bling form Chung Tak Jewellry, But he discovers it’s a fake, so he vents his anger on Yeung-tin’s eldest son Fong Hok-lai.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 38
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2218
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 6
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 10
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 11
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 24
programme.desc: After Kei-tsun’s death, Moon-yuet focuses on dealing with Wai-wan. First, she has to remove wiseguys Wong Yat-ching and Yau-tung, who work for Wai-wan. Moon-yuet and Pak-chung slyly let police discover Kei-tsun’s bloodstains in Yat-ching’s car. And police ask Yat-ching and Yau-tung to assist the investigation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. To stabilize Fong share price and prevent Chiu-kwan from worrying, Hok-lai and Hok-kan and their third younger bother Fong Hok-yin decide to suppress the news about Yeung-tin falling into a coma. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.
